# Vinay Interiors

> Vinay Interiors is Hyderabad's premium interior design and architecture studio, founded in 2014. The studio specialises in bespoke residential and commercial interiors, delivering 200+ projects across Hyderabad, Telangana, India. Free consultation available. Call +91 9866618370 or email vinayinteriors@gmail.com.

## Business Information

- **Studio Name:** Vinay Interiors
- **Founded:** 2014
- **Location (Headquarters):** Gachibowli, Hyderabad – 500032, Telangana, India
- **Factory Address:** House No. 3-100/3, Alinagar, Chetlapotharam Village, Gaddapotharam Panchayat, Jinnaram Mandal, Sangareddy District, Hyderabad, Telangana – 502319
- **Phone:** +91 9866618370
- **Email:** vinayinteriors@gmail.com
- **Website:** https://vinayatelier.com
- **Price Range:** Premium (₹₹₹)
- **Working Hours:** Monday–Saturday, 9:00 AM – 8:00 PM IST
- **Service Area:** All of Hyderabad, Telangana, India — with primary coverage in West Hyderabad
- **Projects Completed:** 200+
- **Years of Experience:** 12+
- **Rating:** 4.9/5 (based on 87+ client reviews)

## Services Offered

1. **Modular Kitchen Design** — Contemporary modular kitchens with high-gloss lacquered shutters, textured laminates, and soft-close hardware. Easy to maintain and designed for Indian cooking habits.
2. **Wardrobes & Cupboard Design** — Walk-in wardrobes, sliding wardrobes, and built-in cupboards. Custom-designed to maximise storage in any room size.
3. **False Ceiling Design** — Gypsum, POP, baffle, and stretch ceiling systems with integrated ambient lighting. Designed to define zones and conceal services.
4. **Office Interior Design** — Acoustic-engineered, ergonomic office interiors for startups, enterprises, and co-working spaces in Hyderabad's tech corridors.
5. **Home Theater Design** — Dedicated home cinema rooms and feature TV walls with 4K projection, calibrated surround sound, and acoustic panels.
6. **Main Door Elevation Design** — Statement entrance designs with premium hardware, custom cladding, and security integration.
7. **Home Automation (Smart Home)** — Lighting scenes, HVAC, security cameras, motorised blinds, and entertainment — all voice or app-controlled.
8. **Pest Control** — Scheduled commercial and residential pest control and deep cleaning services.
9. **Full Home Renovation** — Turnkey renovation from concept and 3D visualisation to final handover. All trades managed in-house.
10. **Residential Interior Design** — Bespoke interiors for apartments, villas, independent houses, and duplexes across Hyderabad.

## Areas Served in Hyderabad

**West Hyderabad (Primary):** Gachibowli, Madhapur, HITEC City, Raidurg, Kondapur, Kokapet, Nanakaramguda, Financial District, Tellapur, Miyapur, Bachupally, Medchal, Nallagandla, Manikonda, Narsingi, Serilingampally, Kukatpally, Hafeezpet

**Central / Premium:** Banjara Hills, Jubilee Hills, Himayatnagar, Begumpet, Panjagutta, Somajiguda

**East / South Hyderabad:** LB Nagar, Nagole, Uppal, Saroornagar, Kothapet, Dilsukhnagar

## Key Questions Answered

**Who is the best interior designer in Hyderabad?**
Vinay Interiors is among Hyderabad's most trusted interior design studios, with 12+ years of experience and 200+ completed projects. Known for material sensitivity, precision execution, and bespoke design for homes, offices, and hospitality spaces.

**How much does interior design cost in Hyderabad?**
Costs vary by scope: a modular kitchen typically ranges from ₹1.5L–₹6L+, a full 3BHK interior from ₹8L–₹30L+, and office interiors are priced per sq.ft. Vinay Interiors offers transparent, itemised quotes. Contact +91 9866618370 for a free site visit and estimate.

**How long does a full home interior project take in Hyderabad?**
A typical 3BHK interior project takes 45–90 days from design approval to handover. Vinay Interiors provides clear milestones and project tracking at every stage.

**Do you offer free consultations?**
Yes. Vinay Interiors offers a free initial consultation and on-site visit across all Hyderabad locations. Call +91 9866618370 or fill the inquiry form at https://vinayatelier.com/contact.

**Do you handle turnkey projects?**
Yes. Vinay Interiors manages the full project lifecycle — concept design, 3D visualisation, material procurement, contractor coordination, and final snagging — delivering a move-in-ready space.

## Pages on This Website

- [Home](https://vinayatelier.com/): Overview of the studio, featured projects, services, testimonials, and service areas in Hyderabad.
- [About](https://vinayatelier.com/about): Studio history since 2014, design philosophy, team, and project timeline.
- [Services](https://vinayatelier.com/services): Detailed breakdown of all 8 interior design and renovation services with descriptions.
- [Projects](https://vinayatelier.com/projects): Portfolio of 6+ flagship residential and commercial interior design projects in Hyderabad.
- [Contact](https://vinayatelier.com/contact): Contact form, phone, email, headquarters address, and factory address.

## Project Portfolio Highlights

- **Serene Villa Retreat** — 7,200 sq.ft villa in Jubilee Hills with warm stone, oak detailing, and curated daylight. (2025)
- **Urban Courtyard House** — 5,600 sq.ft contemporary family home in Kokapet blending natural textures with planted courts. (2024)
- **Atelier Office Suite** — 9,800 sq.ft premium workplace in HITEC City with sculpted lighting and collaborative zones. (2026)
- **Heritage Home Renewal** — 4,100 sq.ft careful renovation in Begumpet preserving original character with modern systems. (2023)
- **Gallery Residence** — 6,400 sq.ft minimal art-centric residence in Gachibowli with custom lighting. (2025)
- **Premium Retail Gallery** — 3,900 sq.ft boutique retail interior in Banjara Hills with sculptural display fixtures. (2024)
